superior.title: Superior Room
superior.description: Succumb to the Superior Room. On the ground floor, it offers direct access to the garden and the superb swimming pool. It communicates via the terrace with an adjoining room to accommodate your entire family.

deluxe.title: Deluxe Room
deluxe.description: Located on an upper floor, the Deluxe Room, 46 m², overlooks the pool from its vast terrace. Very bright and spacious, it offers a large bathroom with shower and bathtub, open to the main room.

juniorSuite.title: Junior Suite Deluxe
juniorSuite.description: Two bathrooms for more privacy, a spacious dressing room, a lounge area and a designer office space. Flooded with light from its large terrace, the Junior Suite Deluxe, 54m², ensures absolute comfort.

suite.title: Suite
suite.description: Flows of light pass through the glass doors opening onto a double terrace. The living room with convertible sofa, the deckchairs facing the pool, the dressing room and the spacious bathroom invite family relaxation.

suiteRyad.title: Riad Suite
suiteRyad.description: The Riad Suite has a separate living room with a sofa bed, a bathroom with shower and bathtub, a patio and a private rooftop terrace offering a panoramic view of the medina.

suiteRoyale.title: Royal Suite
suiteRoyale.description: A 60m² terrace, 2 bedrooms with their private bathroom and a 70m² living room with a convertible sofa lend themselves to unforgettable family moments.

ryad3.title: Riad 3 bedrooms
ryad3.description: Combine the services of a luxury hotel with the intimacy of a private Riad. 3 bedrooms with bathroom, 2 living rooms, 2 terraces, a private pool, and the discreet service of a butler, this is what awaits you in this riad.

ryad4.title: Riad 4 bedrooms
ryad4.description: Ideal for large families or stays with friends, this 250m² riad consists of 4 bedrooms and as many bathrooms, 2 living rooms and a vast 100m² terrace, home to a delightful private pool.

ryad6.title: Riad 6 bedrooms
ryad6.description: A private pool on the edge of a huge 200m² terrace whose light floods 4 living rooms. 6 bedrooms and as many bathrooms and a fitted kitchen. Privacy is preserved in this 450m² riad.

hero.title: Gallery
hero.subtitle: Discover the atmosphere of Riad Alassala through curated photos and day & night ambiances.

day.title: Day Ambiance
day.description: Sunlit courtyards, traditional details and warm colors revealing the riad's architecture.

night.title: Night Ambiance
night.description: An intimate, peaceful atmosphere with lanterns and soft lighting.

dining.title: Gastronomy Between Fountain & Rooftop
dining.description: Authentic Moroccan cuisine in an elegant setting, from the patio fountain to the rooftop with panoramic views.

hero.title: Dining
hero.subtitle: Authentic Moroccan cuisine in an elegant setting, from the patio fountain to the rooftop with panoramic views.

intro.title: Gastronomy Between Fountain & Rooftop
intro.subtitle: Authentic Moroccan cuisine in an elegant setting, from the patio fountain to the rooftop with panoramic views.
intro.description: Savor a refined blend of Moroccan and international cuisine in a lush, artisanal setting. Enjoy a unique ambiance at the patio around the fountain or on the rooftop under the stars, with a panoramic view of Fès medina. An exceptional menu awaits you in an intimate and elegant setting, offering an unforgettable culinary journey

ourCuisine.title: Our Cuisine
ourCuisine.text: At Riad Alassala Fes, every meal is a celebration of authentic Moroccan cuisine. Fassi heritage, local flavors, and a refined atmosphere come together to create an unforgettable experience, under the starry skies of Fes or by the gentle Tinkling Fountain.

leVerdoyant.title: Le Verdoyant
leVerdoyant.text: The menu at Le Verdoyant celebrates the excellence of Moroccan cuisine. Every dish, crafted with fresh, seasonal, locally sourced ingredients, creatively reinterprets traditional Fassi recipes. Flavors intertwine, textures surprise, and colors delight, offering a true culinary journey where authenticity and modernity meet in every bite.

fountain.title: The Fountain, Heart of the Experience
fountain.text: At the heart of the riad's patio, the central fountain of Le Verdoyant gently accompanies each meal with its soothing murmur. Surrounded by lush greenery and Moroccan artisanal details, it transforms the patio into an intimate and serene sanctuary. Every table becomes a refuge where guests can fully savor the richness of the dishes in a timeless, elegant setting.

rooftop.title: Rooftop Experience
rooftop.text: Perched atop Riad Alassala Fes, the rooftop offers panoramic vistas over the ancient city and the Atlas Mountains. At La Table Panoramique and Fez From Above, each meal becomes a journey: authentic Moroccan cuisine crafted with fresh, seasonal ingredients, signature cocktails, Moroccan tea and local delicacies, all in a refined rooftop ambiance where gastronomy and the panorama harmonize.

breakfast.title: Breakfast — A Morning in the Heart of Fes
breakfast.text: Each morning, your stay includes a table-served breakfast as part of our B&B offering. Enjoy it in the patio, by the fountain, bathed in soft light. Fresh breads and pastries, flaky msemmen, Moroccan pancakes, artisanal jams and honey, seasonal fruits, freshly pressed juices, and aromatic teas and coffees infused with local spices. A warm, sensory moment where tradition and comfort meet.

presentation.title: Our Cuisine
presentation.description: At Riad Alassala Fes, every meal is a celebration of authentic Moroccan cuisine. Fassi heritage, local flavors, and a refined atmosphere come together to create an unforgettable experience, under the starry skies of Fes or by the gentle Tinkling Fountain.

concept.title: Culinary Philosophy
concept.description: We believe in simple, generous cuisine inspired by local recipes. Every dish is prepared using fresh ingredients sourced from local markets and crafted with attention to authenticity.

rooftop.title: Rooftop Experience
rooftop.description: Enjoy breakfast, lunch or dinner on our rooftop terrace with panoramic views over the old medina. A peaceful setting for memorable moments.

breakfastPage.title: Breakfast
breakfastPage.description: Start your day with a homemade breakfast including fresh bread, pastries, seasonal fruit, Moroccan specialties and hot drinks prepared to order.

menu.title: Menu (PDF)
menu.description: Discover our homemade dishes inspired by Moroccan tradition and prepared daily with fresh produce.

leVerdoyant.name: Le Verdoyant
leVerdoyant.description: A lush heaven where Moroccan and international flavors mingle with the gentle murmurs of the fountain. Every meal becomes a suspended moment in the heart of Fès medina.

LeVerdoyantRooftop.name: Le Verdoyant Rooftop
LeVerdoyantRooftop.description: A suspended retreat where Moroccan and international flavors are savored under the stars. Every meal on the rooftop with panoramic views of Fès medina becomes an unforgettable moment between sky and city.

LeVerdoyantCoffeeShop.name: Le Verdoyant Coffee Shop
LeVerdoyantCoffeeShop.description: Between the rooftop and the lush patio, our coffee shop celebrates fresh juices and Moroccan tea time in a peaceful, light-filled atmosphere.

roomService.title: In-Room Dining Service
roomService.description: Enjoy the best of Riad Alassala Fes gastronomy in the intimacy of your room, suite or private riad. Our in-room dining service is available 24/7 and offers a selection of locavore, Mediterranean and seasonal dishes by Chef Hamza Alquir.

wardya.title: Le Wardya
wardya.description: In a dream setting by the pool, Le Wardya restaurant offers refined and flavorful Mediterranean cuisine.

lounge.title: Pool Lounge
lounge.description: A friendly space to enjoy fresh cocktails and light cuisine throughout the day.

bar.title: Le Bar
bar.description: An elegant bar offering a selection of signature cocktails and fine wines in a refined atmosphere.

terrace.title: Panoramic Terrace
terrace.description: Enjoy a unique culinary experience on our terrace with stunning views of the gardens and medina.

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast featuring fresh local products in an elegant setting.

leVerdoyant.title: Le Verdoyant
leVerdoyant.intro1: In the heart of the Fès medina, Le Verdoyant unveils an exceptional patio where lush greenery and the gentle murmur of the fountain create a timeless atmosphere. Our restaurant in Fès celebrates refined Moroccan and international cuisine, crafted with carefully selected ingredients.
leVerdoyant.intro2: Away from the bustle of the medina, each lunch or dinner becomes an elegant sensory experience, blending Moroccan art de vivre with understated sophistication. A discreet address for dining in Fès within a serene and verdant setting.

menu.title: From Our Heritage to Global Flavors
menu.text1: At Le Verdoyant, the menu reveals an open and harmonious vision of gastronomy. Moroccan cuisine naturally dialogues with international inspirations, in a contemporary approach that honors its roots while exploring new expressions of flavor.
menu.text2: The rich flavors of Moroccan terroir subtly blend with influences from afar, creating balanced, generous, and modern dishes. Each creation embodies the meeting of tradition and innovation, offering a refined culinary experience in the heart of Fès medina.

setting.title: An Oasis in the Heart of Fès Medina
setting.text1: Nestled within Riad Alassala, Le Verdoyant unveils a lush patio where the gentle murmur of the fountain mingles with the soft rustle of leaves. Sunlight dances across the ancient Fassi stones, casting warm patterns over the greenery, while the subtle fragrance of aromatic plants drifts through the air, awakening the senses.
setting.text2: Each table invites you to linger, with delicate aromatic arrangements enhancing the experience. The intimate patio offers a serene escape, where every sip, every bite, and every glance becomes a moment suspended between nature, tradition, and the timeless beauty of Fès.

philosophy.title: The Art of Savoring the Moment
philosophy.text1: At Le Verdoyant, every meal celebrates gastronomy, heritage, and artisanal craftsmanship. The tables are set within a patio where ancient stones, traditional zelliges, and finely crafted woodwork reveal the authentic soul of Fès. Moroccan and international flavors, elevated by ingredients carefully sourced from local artisans, tell the story of the land and its traditions.
philosophy.text2: Each bite becomes a journey between tradition and modernity, transforming the meal into a refined sensory experience, where authenticity and elegance meet in the heart of the medina.

items.question: How to Book a Table at Le Verdoyant?
items.answer: Reservations can be made directly by phone at +212 608 03 96 58. Advance booking is recommended, especially for large groups.

items.question: Is Valet Service Available?
items.answer: Valet parking is available for Le Verdoyant guests, making access to the restaurant simple and convenient. Guests can enjoy a stress-free arrival while exploring the vibrant Fès medina and the peaceful patio setting.

items.question: The Restaurant Can Host Private Events?
items.answer: The restaurant can host private events and group gatherings depending on availability. Tailored experiences are offered in the patio with its soothing fountain, combining authentic flavors with a serene and memorable ambiance.

items.question: Is Wi-Fi Available?
items.answer: Complimentary Wi-Fi is available for all Le Verdoyant guests, allowing you to stay connected while enjoying the peaceful ambiance of the patio and fountain.

leVerdoyantRooftop.title: Le Verdoyant Rooftop
leVerdoyantRooftop.intro: A rooftop haven above the heart of Fès, where Moroccan and international cuisine is enjoyed under the open sky. The gentle evening breeze, panoramic views of the medina, and the soft glow of the stars create a magical dining experience, turning every meal into a memorable celebration of flavors and atmosphere.

menu.title: Gastronomy, Moroccan and Beyond
menu.text1: At Le Verdoyant Rooftop, traditional Moroccan dishes pay tribute to Fassi craftsmanship, enhanced with contemporary touches.
menu.text2: An international menu complements the selection to satisfy every taste, offering a refined and memorable culinary experience where heritage, creativity, and the art of living come together in the heart of Fès.

setting.title: Fes From Above
setting.text1: Perched above the medina of Fès, the Verdoyant Rooftop offers 360° panoramic views of the historic city. Ochre rooftops, bustling alleys, and minarets unfold before your eyes as the sun sets on the horizon.
setting.text2: Under the open sky and twinkling stars, this elevated patio becomes a magical retreat, where the cool evening breeze, soft light, and timeless beauty of Fès create a suspended moment between sky and city.

items.question: How to Book a Table at Le Verdoyant Rooftop?
items.answer: Reservations can be made directly by phone at +212 608 03 96 58. Advance booking is recommended, especially for large groups.

items.question: Is the Rooftop Accessible in Winter and Summer?
items.answer: Yes. Le Verdoyant Rooftop is accessible all year round, both in winter and summer. We offer a covered rooftop space that allows guests to enjoy the panoramic views over Fès while staying comfortably sheltered during cooler days or rainy weather.

items.question: The Restaurant Can Host Private Events?
items.answer: Le Verdoyant Rooftop welcomes private dinners, birthday celebrations, team-building events, corporate gatherings, and special evenings, depending on availability. Each event can be tailored to create a refined and memorable experience in a unique setting overlooking the medina of Fès.

items.question: Is Wi-Fi Available?
items.answer: Complimentary Wi-Fi is available for all Le Verdoyant guests, allowing you to stay connected while enjoying the peaceful ambiance of the patio and fountain.

leVerdoyantCoffeeShop.title: Le Verdoyant Coffee Shop
leVerdoyantCoffeeShop.intro: At Le Verdoyant Coffee Shop, every pause is yours to enjoy—choose between the rooftop with panoramic views of the medina or the serene patio. Refined coffees and house-made treats accompany each moment in a truly inspiring and elegant setting.

menu.title: Moroccan Tea & Treats
menu.text: Savor a carefully curated selection of hot and refreshing beverages, perfectly paired for an elegant pause. The Tea Time experience invites you to indulge in Moroccan teas, specialty coffees, and traditional pastries, crafted to offer moments of refined pleasure and timeless enjoyment.

experience.title: Savor the Senses
experience.text: Immerse yourself in the refined ambiance of a Fassi riad, where coffee, teas, and house-made sweets awaken the senses. Whether on the rooftop with panoramic medina views or in the lush patio, every moment becomes a celebration of elegance, authenticity, and the art of living.

services.title: Services & Amenities
items: Rooftop or patio with soothing fountain

experiences.title: Experiences and activities at Riad Alassala Fès
experiences.intro: At Riad Alassala, the experience goes beyond your stay, inviting you to discover the true soul of the Fes Medina, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Within an intimate and refined setting, each moment becomes an immersion into the history, craftsmanship, and living traditions of Morocco’s spiritual capital. Enjoy curated cultural experiences including guided medina tours, artisan workshops, Moroccan cooking classes, and immersive walks through vibrant souks and historic landmarks. Tailor made excursions in the surrounding landscapes add an extra sense of discovery and serenity. Blending authenticity, elegance, and meaningful encounters, Riad Alassala offers an inspiring stay for travelers seeking culture, connection, and unforgettable memories.

riad.title: Moroccan Culinary Secrets Unveiled
riad.description: Discover the essence of Moroccan cuisine through hands-on cooking classes, traditional techniques, and the rich flavors that define the culinary heritage of Fes.

riad.title: Zellige Craft Secrets Unveiled
riad.description: Discover the art of traditional zellige through hands-on classes, timeless techniques, and geometric patterns inspired by the architectural heritage of Fes.

nearby.title: Moroccan Beauty & Hammam Secrets
nearby.description: Relax in Fes: Moroccan hammams, soothing treatments, and timeless wellness

nearby.title: Guided Tour to the Medina of Fes
nearby.description: Uncover the soul of Fes: artisan treasures and centuries of Moroccan heritage

nearby.title: Day Trip: Meknes & Moulay Idriss via Volubilis
nearby.description: Discover ancient ruins, imperial history, and the charm of Morocco’s heritage sites

nearby.title: 3-Day Desert Adventure: Fes to Marrakech via Merzouga
nearby.description: Explore the Sahara, ride camels, and sleep under the stars on this unforgettable journey

nearby.title: Day trip to Chefchaouen
nearby.description: Discover the magic of Chefchaouen’s blue streets and lively alleys.

cooking.title: The Taste of Moroccan Cuisine
cooking.intro: Join our Chef for a hands-on journey into Morocco’s culinary treasures. From picking ingredients at local markets to mastering traditional Fassi recipes, discover the flavors, techniques, and stories that have shaped Moroccan cuisine for centuries

sections.title: The Taste of Moroccan Cuisine
sections.content: Put your cooking skills to the test in a 3-hour hands-on masterclass, where you’ll learn to make an authentic Moroccan Fassi dish. Begin by choosing fresh ingredients at the local market with your host and Chef Wafae, picking up a bit of Arabic along the way! At Riad Alassala, Wafae will guide you through every step, sharing the secrets of spice dosing and Moroccan cooking techniques. Our Cooking Classes with Wafae are an unforgettable experience you’ll treasure for life.
sections.menu:
Starter – Moroccan salads, Pastilla & Briouates
Main – Tagines, Couscous
sections.includes: Bottled water, Lunch, Tea or Coffee

sections.title: The art of Moroccan pastry
sections.content: When it comes to Moroccan pastries, our pastry chef Meriem is simply the best! In this half-day baking class in the heart of Fes Medina, you’ll learn the secrets of Moroccan pastry, discover traditional ingredients, and master delights like Briouates, Kaab Ghzal, and Ghriba. Immerse yourself in the art of Moroccan baking and culture with Meriem’s expert guidance.
sections.menu: Selection of Moroccan pastries and sweeties
sections.includes: Bottled water, Tea or Coffee, Selection of Moroccan Sweeties

sections.title: Moroccan Tea Challenge
sections.content: Discover the art of Moroccan tea with our Pastry Chef Meriem and explore the rich history of this iconic beverage. By the end of the class, you’ll master the perfect Moroccan tea and savor it alongside the finest homemade Moroccan pastries.
sections.includes: Bottled water, Tea or Coffee, Selection of Moroccan Sweeties

zellige.title: Zellige Craft Secrets Unveiled
zellige.intro: Zellige: the soul of Fes Riads. These intricate Moroccan mosaics don’t just decorate walls — they tell centuries of artistry, culture, and heritage that make every Riad unique.

sections.title: Craft Your Moroccan Mosaics
sections.content: Join our hands-on Zellige workshop at Riad Alassala. Guided by a skilled artisan, you’ll learn how to cut and assemble vibrant mosaic tiles, discover the history behind each pattern, and create your own masterpiece to take home. A true dive into Moroccan craftsmanship and creativity!

hammam.title: Moroccan Beauty & Hammam Secrets
hammam.intro: Fes is famous for its hammams and spas! While our Riad doesn’t have its own facilities, we can arrange a session at a local hammam or spa, offering a full range of Moroccan wellness and beauty treatments. Experience the traditional rituals of a Moroccan hammam — a must-do for relaxation and rejuvenation. Contact us to explore all available packages and prices.

sections.title: Moroccan Beauty & Hammam Secrets
content: Private Traditional Hammam (40min includes scrubbing, soaping, mask with clay)
Private Traditional Hammam (50 min includes scrubbing, soaping, mask with clay and 15 min Massage)
Private Traditional Hammam (70 min includes scrubbing, soaping, mask with clay and 30 min relaxing Massage)
Public Traditional Hammam (includes scrubbing, soaping, mask with clay)
Public Traditional Hammam (includes scrubbing, soaping, mask with clay and 15 min massage inside the Hammam)

medina.title: Guided Tour to the Medina of Fes
medina.intro: Discover Fes with a guided tour featuring the Al Quaraouiyine University, Bou Inania Madrasa, Nejjarine Fountain, the Royal Palace gates, the famous Chouara Tanneries, and the vibrant souks of the ancient Medina.

sections.title: Wander Through Fes’ Labyrinths
sections.content:
Good morning Fes! Close the doors of modern civilization behind you and fly through the winding alleys of Fes on a magical journey. Led by a knowledgeable local guide, you’ll discover thousands of years of history in one of the world’s largest medinas.
Navigate the bustling souks, meet skilled craftsmen in their tiny workshops, and immerse yourself in the sights, sounds, and smells of this unique city.

sections.title: Every Craft Tells a Story
sections.content:
Behind each piece of Fes craftsmanship is a story — the life of someone who shaped the city. Your guide will reveal how each item became a landmark and help you understand the history and culture through the artistry.
Fes’ soul lives on through generations and traditions, offering a magical experience that keeps visitors coming back for its peace, warmth, and timeless charm.

meknesVolubilis.title: Day Trip: Meknes & Moulay Idriss via Volubilis
meknesVolubilis.intro: Journey through imperial history and ancient civilizations on a refined day trip from Fes to Meknes, Moulay Idriss, and the Roman ruins of Volubilis.

sections.title: Discover Morocco’s Imperial Grandeur
sections.content: After a delightful breakfast at Riad Alassala Fes, your private driver will escort you to Meknes, the Ismaili imperial capital named after the Miknasa Berber tribe. Explore its remarkable heritage, including the monumental Bab Mansour, one of Morocco’s most impressive gates, and the vast royal complex of Dar El Makhzen. Continue to the sacred hilltop town of Moulay Idriss Zerhoun, one of Morocco’s most revered pilgrimage sites, offering breathtaking views and a serene spiritual atmosphere.

sections.title: Walk Through Ancient Civilizations
sections.content: Travel onward to Volubilis, a UNESCO-listed archaeological site and one of the best-preserved Roman ruins in North Africa. Once thriving from olive cultivation, the city flourished with grand villas, triumphal arches, and intricate mosaic floors. Over centuries, Romans, early Christian communities, and Islamic settlers shaped this remarkable site before it was abandoned and later partially restored. Today, Volubilis stands as a timeless testimony to Morocco’s layered history and cultural crossroads.

desertMerzouga.title: 3-Day Desert Adventure: Fes to Marrakech via Merzouga
desertMerzouga.intro: Journey from Fes to Marrakech through Morocco’s most breathtaking landscapes — the Middle Atlas Mountains, the golden Sahara dunes, and legendary kasbahs.

sections.title: DAY 1 — From the Middle Atlas to the Sahara Dunes
sections.subtitle: A Scenic Journey to Merzouga
sections.content:
After breakfast at Riad Alassala Fes, depart early toward Merzouga through the spectacular landscapes of the Middle Atlas. Travel through Berber villages, cedar forests, and mountain plateaus, with stops in Ifrane and the famous monkey forest of Azrou Cedar Forest.

Upon arrival at the Erg Chebbi dunes, ride camels into the desert to witness a magical sunset, followed by a traditional dinner and an unforgettable night under the stars in a Sahara camp.

sections.title: DAY 2 — Sunrise Over the Desert & Southern Landscapes
sections.subtitle: From Sahara Serenity to Towering Canyons
sections.content:
Wake early to experience a breathtaking sunrise over the dunes. After breakfast, discover local culture in Merzouga and visit a Gnawa village before continuing toward Ouarzazate.

On the way, stop at the dramatic Todgha Gorge, famous for its towering cliffs and river-carved landscapes. Continue to the fortified ksar of Aït Benhaddou before dinner and overnight stay in Ouarzazate.

sections.title: DAY 3 — Kasbahs, Cinema Heritage & Arrival in Marrakech
sections.subtitle: Along Morocco’s Legendary Caravan Route
sections.content:
After breakfast, explore historic kasbahs and the renowned film studios of Ouarzazate, often called the Hollywood of Morocco.

Cross the High Atlas landscapes before arriving in Marrakech, the vibrant final destination of your unforgettable Moroccan adventure.

sections.title: Included in the Experience
content: Full transport from Fes to Marrakech

chefchaouen.title: Day Trip to Chefchaouen
chefchaouen.intro: Step into a world of cobalt alleys and mountain serenity as you journey from Fes to Chefchaouen, Morocco’s Blue Pearl, where history, culture, and breathtaking landscapes await at every turn.

sections.title: Journey to the Blue Pearl of Morocco
sections.content:
After breakfast at your riad in Fes, depart toward the enchanting town of Chefchaouen, nestled in the heart of the Rif Mountains.

Known as the “Blue Pearl,” this peaceful mountain town captivates visitors with its serene atmosphere, fresh mountain air, and breathtaking scenery.

sections.title: A Medina Washed in Blue
sections.content:
Wander through the picturesque medina, where narrow alleyways and whitewashed houses glow in calming shades of blue.

Founded in 1471 by Moulay Ali Ben Moussa Ben Rached, the city reflects Andalusian heritage and mountain traditions.

Discover artisan boutiques, woven textiles, and local goat cheese specialties while soaking in the authentic rhythm of daily life.

sections.title: Authentic Charm & Panoramic Views
sections.content:
Relax in the lively main square near the historic Kasbah of Chefchaouen and the Grand Mosque of Chefchaouen, where cafés offer panoramic views and a welcoming ambiance.

After an unforgettable immersion into one of Morocco’s most photogenic destinations, return comfortably to Fes in the evening.

sejour.question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
sejour.answer: Check-in is from 2:00 PM and check-out is until 12:00 PM. Late check-out may be available upon request, subject to availability.

sejour.question: Is the riad accessible by car?
sejour.answer: The riad is located the Fes medina and is accessible on foot. We can arrange assistance for luggage and transfers.

sejour.question: Do you offer airport transfers?
sejour.answer: Yes, we provide airport transfers to and from Fes Airport upon request.

sejour.question: Is Wi-Fi available in the riad?
sejour.answer: Yes, complimentary Wi-Fi is available throughout the riad.

sejour.question: Are the rooms air-conditioned?
sejour.answer: Yes, all rooms are equipped with air conditioning for your comfort.

sejour.question: Is breakfast included?
sejour.answer: Yes, a traditional Moroccan breakfast is included with your stay.

restaurants.question: Is there a restaurant on-site?
restaurants.answer: Yes, our restaurant offers traditional Moroccan cuisine prepared with fresh local ingredients.

restaurants.question: Do I need to reserve for dinner?
restaurants.answer: We highly recommend making a reservation in advance, especially for dinner.

restaurants.question: Do you offer vegetarian or special dietary options?
restaurants.answer: Yes, we offer vegetarian dishes and can adapt menus to accommodate dietary requirements.

bienetre.question: Does the riad have a spa or hammam?
bienetre.answer: Yes, we offer wellness experiences including traditional hammam and massages upon reservation.

bienetre.question: Can I book a massage?
bienetre.answer: Yes, a variety of massage treatments are available upon request.

experiences.question: Do you organize guided tours of the medina?
experiences.answer: Yes, we can arrange guided tours with certified local guides.

experiences.question: Do you offer excursions from Fes?
experiences.answer: Yes, we offer excursions to the desert, Chefchaouen, and other destinations.

experiences.question: Can experiences be customized?
experiences.answer: Yes, all experiences can be tailored to your preferences.

footer.developer: DEVELOPED BY HWS AUTHENTIC MOROCCAN HOSPITALITY IN THE HEART OF FES

hero.title: Accommodation
hero.subtitle: Rooms and suites designed to offer comfort, authenticity, and the calm atmosphere of a traditional Moroccan home.

section.title: Rooms & Suites
section.description: We have created an atmosphere where you can experience the past with its effortless elegance. Every room and luxury suite at Riad Alassala have been beautifully furnished. The resulting spaces pair contemporary comfort with elements evoking the Riad’s traditional heritage. Setting the scene for a truly memorable stay in the heart of Medina of Fes.

budgetSingleRoom.name: Budget Single Room
budgetSingleRoom.description: This cozy single room features authentic Moroccan touches, warm interiors, and all the necessary amenities to ensure a comfortable and relaxing stay.

standardDoubleRoom.name: Standard Double Room
standardDoubleRoom.description: Blending rich Moroccan style with contemporary comfort, this refined space invites you to unwind with gentle fountain views and soothing light for a truly tranquil stay.

juniorSuite.name: Junior Suite
juniorSuite.description: The fountain whispers as sunlight streams through the suite, illuminating Moroccan tiles and fabrics. With a double bed and two single beds, it becomes a sanctuary where everyday life fades into calm and discovery.

executiveSuite.name: Executive suite
executiveSuite.description: Moroccan-Fassi elegance meets modern comfort in this suite, with a Super King-size bed and a balcony overlooking the fountain for a peaceful Fes stay.

duplex.name: Duplex Family Room
duplex.description: Spanning two levels, this elegant suite combines Moroccan charm with modern comfort. A Super King-size bed, handcrafted sitting area, and private terrace with panoramic views create a serene and exclusive retreat.

services.title: Our services
general: Panoramic terrace with views over Fès
juniorSuite: Extra-long beds (> 2 meters) with comfortable bedding
standardDoubleRoom: Extra-long beds (> 2 meters) with comfortable bedding

hero.title: Meetings & Events
hero.subtitle: Host your gatherings in an authentic Moroccan setting combining intimacy, elegance and warm hospitality.

intro.title: The Art of Hosting in the Heart of Fes
intro.description: At Riad Alassala Fes, every event becomes an intimate and refined experience. Nestled in the historic heart of the Medina of Fez, our riad blends authentic Moroccan heritage, warm hospitality, and a serene atmosphere to create a truly unique setting for your special moments. Whether for private celebrations, elegant dinners, or cultural gatherings, Riad Alassala offers a timeless ambiance where elegance meets authenticity.
intro.highlight: A unique venue in Fes for unforgettable and meaningful events.

exclusivity.title: Full Riad Privatisation
exclusivity.description: Privatize Riad Alassala Fes for exclusive events. Enjoy our lush courtyard, panoramic rooftop, and elegant salons for weddings, celebrations, or corporate retreats. Full privacy and tailored service for unforgettable moments.

celebrations.title: Private & Corporate Events
celebrations.description: Design your event with precision and style. From professional meetings to intimate private gatherings, Riad Alassala Fes creates bespoke experiences with personalized service, refined details, and an atmosphere of elegance and exclusivity. Make every occasion truly unforgettable.

activities.title: Activities
items: Yoga & meditation sessions on the rooftop

intro.title: Step into the Soul of Fes
intro.description: Lose yourself in the labyrinth of Fes, where every alley, mosaic, and aroma tells a story. From bustling souks and hidden artisan workshops to sun-dappled patios and secret courtyards, the Medina is a living mosaic of history, craft, and culture. Every step is a discovery, every moment an unforgettable connection with Morocco’s timeless soul.

sections.title: The Medina of Fes
sections.description: Wander through spice-scented souks, hidden palaces, and artisan alleys — a living journey into Fes’ vibrant culture.

sections.title: Must-See Monuments of Fes
sections.description: Discover Fes’ iconic landmarks. Each ancient alley, majestic gate, and artisan square tells a story of Morocco’s timeless soul.

sections.title: Souks & Artisans
sections.description: Explore Fes’ souks — a vibrant world of color, scent, and artisan mastery. Leather, zellige, and pottery tell centuries of Moroccan heritage.

essentials.title: Fes Essentials
tips: Lose yourself in alleys and souks
Explore in morning or late afternoon
Enjoy mint tea and Fassi pastries
experiences: Sip mint tea with views over the Medina
Taste traditional Fassi pastries and sweets

medinaPage.title: The Medina of Fes
medinaPage.subtitle: Wander through spice-scented souks, hidden palaces, and artisan alleys — a living journey into Fes’ vibrant culture.

block1.title: A World to Discover
block1.text1: Stepping into the Medina of Fes is like entering a living maze of spice-scented souks, copper workshops echoing with rhythmic hammering, sunlit alleyways, and hidden palaces behind intricately carved doors.
block1.text2: Every step unveils a new scene, a color, a sound, an emotion.

block2.title: A Sensory Immersion
block2.text1: Here, ancient fountains whisper with the rhythm of the city, madrasas captivate with their delicate zellige tiles, and small shops overflow with handwoven carpets, glowing lanterns, and handcrafted treasures.
block2.text2: Staying at Riad Alassala Fes means experiencing the medina from within — a journey of tradition, discovery, and endless wonder.

monumentsPage.title: Must-See Monuments of Fes
monumentsPage.intro: Step into a world where time seems to stand still. Fes is not a city you simply visit — it is a city you feel. Its majestic monuments, ancient alleyways, and architectural treasures create a living stage, where every step reveals a new wonder.

block1.title: The iconic jewels of the city

items.title: Bab Boujloud (The Blue Gate)
items.description: The emblematic entrance to the medina, a symbolic passage between the modern world and the ancestral soul of Fes.

items.title: Al Quaraouiyine University
items.description: The spiritual and intellectual heart of the city, a cradle of knowledge for centuries.

items.title: Bou Inania Madrasa
items.description: An architectural masterpiece where carved wood and zellige quietly tell stories of the past.

items.title: Al Attarine Madrasa
items.description: A true open-air work of art, celebrated for its refinement and perfect harmony.

items.title: Nejjarine Fountain and Foundouk
items.description: One of the most poetic squares in Fes, framed by ancient architecture and timeless charm.

items.title: Chouara Tanneries
items.description: A breathtaking spectacle of color and ancestral gestures, a living testimony to traditional craftsmanship.

items.title: Dar Batha Museum
items.description: A former palace turned museum, offering a refined immersion into Moroccan artistic heritage.

items.title: The Marinid Tombs
items.description: A spectacular panoramic view over the medina, especially magical at sunset.

block3.title: Other hidden treasures to explore
block3.description: Beyond the iconic landmarks, Fes reveals its secrets to those who take time to wander:
list: The Royal Palace and its monumental gates
Borj Nord and Borj Sud, ancient fortresses with panoramic views
Jnan Sbil Gardens, a haven of freshness and calm
Seffarine Square and its rhythmic copper workshops
Bab Ftouh and Bab El Mahrouk gates
Pottery quarters and traditional artisan workshops

souksPage.title: Souks & Artisans
souksPage.intro: Exploring the souks of Fes is more than a stroll—it’s an immersion in culture, a dialogue with time, and an unforgettable experience where tradition and authenticity reveal themselves at every turn.

block1.title: A Sensory Journey
block1.description: The souks of Fes are a living theater of colors, scents, and centuries-old craftsmanship—a sensory voyage that instantly transports you to the soul of Morocco.

block2.title: Craftsmanship Around Every Corner
block2.text1: Here, leather is dyed under expert hands, metal is shaped and engraved, and zellige tiles sparkle in the light of the patios.
block2.text2: Every object tells a story, every artisan preserves a heritage passed down through generations.

highlights: Spices and local delicacies to taste or take home
